untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a machine learning classifier prediction output (model.predict()) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The probability threshold (0.5 in source code) and sign-based position conversion require external ML model inference, not technical indicators. Additionally, the exact model type, training data, and feature set are not specified in the source material.
translation_notes: Source code shows: (1) ML classifier predictions > 0.5 threshold, (2) conversion to binary positions (1/-1) based on prediction sign, (3) next-period reversal exits. This is a supervised learning strategy that cannot be expressed using only technical indicators. To implement this backtest, you would need to: supply pre-calculated model predictions as an additional data column, or integrate the trained model object directly into the backtest engine.
